## Page 338

#### Template 1a – Assets for the calculation of GAR (revenue)

## Page 339

#### Template 1b – Assets for the calculation of GAR (capex)

## Page 339

**1.Assets for the calculation of GAR based on the CaPex KPI of the counterpart**

## Page 339

Image /page/338/Figure/2 description: This image shows a table with rows and columns. The table contains financial data related to assets, loans, and investments, categorized by different sectors and types. The table includes information on taxonomy-eligible and environmentally sustainable assets, as well as data on climate change mitigation and adaptation. Specific values are provided for various categories, such as loans and advances, debt securities, and equity instruments, across different sectors like financial undertakings, non-financial undertakings, and households. The table also includes data on off-balance sheet exposures and assets under management. The table is titled with column headers such as "Total [gross] carrying amount", "Climate Change Mitigation (CCM)", "Climate Change Adaptation (CCA)", "Water and marine resources (WTR)", "Circular economy (CE)", "Pollution (PPC)", and "Biodiversity and Ecosystems (BIO)". The table also includes data on "Of which towards taxonomy relevant sectors (Taxonomy-eligible)" and "Of which environmentally sustainable (Taxonomy-aligned)". The table includes the following data: 16,719.03, 15,040.66, 484.61, 420.46, 26.05, 1,595.46, 231.78, 316.27, 19.69, 1,279.19, 212.09, 586.23, 271.54, 64.15, 26.05, 254.31, 128.37, 27.86, 22.20, 331.92, 143.16, 69.13, 3.85, 14,537.34, 14,537.34, 420.46, 420.46, 13,945.62, 13,945.62, 194.83, 194.83, 252.26, 252.26, 225.63, 225.63, 339.46, 339.46, 23,424.36, 17,103.05, 10,383, 7,366, 1,099, 0, 3,014, 2.97, 6,719.58, 4,691.15, 2,028.29, 0.08, 347.85, 1,348.40, 139.16, 4,485.90, 40,143.39, 15,040.66, 484.61, 420.46, 26.05, 15,320.12, 2,945.86, 12,374.26, 55,463.51, 15,040.66, 484.61, 420.46, 26.05, 3.22, 406.22, 25.67, 7.35, 0.13, 0.29, 224.27, 14.03, 4.07, 0.05, 0.21, 166.67, 11.63, 3.28, 0.07, 0.08.

## Page 340

Image /page/339/Figure/1 description: This table provides GAR sector information based on the turnover KPI of the counterpart. The table includes columns for breakdown by sector - NACE 4 digits level (code and label), Climate Change Mitigation (CCM), Climate Change Adaptation (CCA), Water and marine resources (WTR), Circular economy (CE), Pollution (PPC), Biodiversity and Ecosystems (BIO), and TOTAL (CCM + CCA + WTR + CE + PPC + BIO). Each sector is further divided into Non-Financial corporates (Subject) and SMEs and other NFC not subject, with [Gross] carrying amount listed for each. Additionally, each sector includes a column for Mn EUR and Of which environmentally sustainable. The table lists various sectors with corresponding codes and labels, along with their respective carrying amounts and environmentally sustainable amounts. For example, C1104 has a carrying amount of 31.71, C1105 has 4.89, C1520 has 14.10, and so on. The TOTAL column shows the sum of environmentally sustainable amounts for each sector, such as 31.71 for C1104 and 4.89 for C1105.
